title: pilea lamiifolia var. lamiifolia
intro: Pilea lamiifolia var. lamiifolia, also known as the Chinese lettuce plant, is a type of flowering plant in the Urticaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, with the leaves and stems being used in herbal preparations.
